protocols.Paper_title: Expression and purification of a functional human hepatitis B virus polymerase
protocols.Evidence: cellular DNA was isolated from tissues by SDS-protease K digestion and phenol-chloroform extraction; HBV-Pol sequence was amplified

protocols.Paper_title: Expression and purification of a functional human hepatitis B virus polymerase
protocols.Evidence: Cells were harvested by centrifugation and disrupted with lysis-buffer ... SDS; expression level was determined with dot blot

protocols.Paper_title: Expression and purification of a functional human hepatitis B virus polymerase
protocols.Evidence: strong detergent (SDS) was employed in the lysis step; SDS was replaced by NP-40 during washing and elution

protocols.Paper_title: Expression and purification of a functional human hepatitis B virus polymerase
protocols.Evidence: plasmid pT7-Pol was purified with Qiagen Midiprep DNA purification kit; in vitro transcription and translation reactions were performed
